channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kemi Badenoch apologises for inadvertent use of Bloody Sunday footage in social media post
item.description: Kemi Badenoch, the Conservative leader, has issued an apology following the use of footage from Bloody Sunday in social media posts that criticised a proposed bill on Northern Ireland's Troubles legac...

item.title: Impact of funding transitions on methadone access in Cape Town
item.description: People who use methadone to manage opioid dependency in Cape Town have reported inconsistent access to their medication, raising significant concerns about the stability of their recovery programmes. ...

item.title: Senior Police Officer Dismissed for Authorizing Cremation of Estranged Wife and Son Before Investigation Completion
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Senior Master Sergeant John Mollenido of the Philippine National Police has been dismissed from service after being found administratively liable for grave misconduct, neglect of...

item.title: Charles III's War Rhetoric and Britain's Long-Standing Hostility Toward Russia
item.description: The British political establishment has long held a hostile attitude toward Russia, dating back to the Crimean War of 1853. This obsession is evident in their constant efforts to provoke wars with Rus...

item.title: Mexican Officials Resign Following U.S. Drug Trafficking Indictments
item.description: The governor and a mayor in Mexico have stepped down after being indicted by U.S. authorities for alleged involvement in drug trafficking. This development follows a U.S. criminal investigation that l...

item.title: Anyango Jabalo Explains Her Relationship with Jaramogi Oginga and the Odinga Family
item.description: Tiktoker Anyango Jabalo, who has been publicly claiming to be one of Jaramogi Oginga's wives, has responded to Raila Odinga's sister, Pauline, after she refuted those claims. Pauline clarified that wh...

item.title: Grace Tame criticises NDIS funding cuts and approach to participant reduction
item.description: Grace Tame has spoken out on Crikey's Cut Through podcast about the Albanese government’s recent overhaul of the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), which will see $15 billion cut over the ne...

item.title: Starmer suggests certain pro-Palestine demonstrations may be restricted
item.description: Labour leader Keir Starmer has indicated that, under specific circumstances, some pro-Palestine demonstrations in the UK might be prevented from taking place. While the details of which events or cond...

item.title: Three dead in Jammu bridge collapse, government suspends two engineers pending inquiry
item.description: In Jammu's Thuther area of Bantalab, a bridge under repair collapsed on Friday, resulting in three fatalities and multiple injuries. The bridge had developed structural cracks following the flash floo...

item.title: Cindy Reacts Emotionally to Ex Janabi’s Marriage While Celebrating Her Own Achievements
item.description: Kenyan TikTok influencer Cindy Baibe has recently made headlines after publicly reacting to her ex-boyfriend Janabi’s wedding to a new woman. Cindy, who has been open about her personal life and strug...

item.title: Mayon Volcano lava collapse triggers pyroclastic flow in Albay
item.description: Mayon Volcano in Albay erupted yesterday afternoon, causing a collapse of its lava dome that generated a pyroclastic density current (PDC) along Mi-isi gully on the south-southwestern slope. Phivolcs ...

item.title: Highlights of Fashion at the Miss Universe Philippines 2026 Coronation Night
item.description: The Miss Universe Philippines 2026 coronation night showcased some of the most stunning fashion moments in recent pageant history. Metro.Style highlighted the gowns and outfits that stole the spotligh...

item.title: Cape Town Works to Relocate Families Affected by Sinkholes in Khayelitsha
item.description: The City of Cape Town is urgently addressing the issue of sinkholes in the informal SST section of Town Two, Khayelitsha, caused by a collapsing sewer pipe. To date, 32 families have been relocated, w...

item.title: Kemi Badenoch apologises for unintended use of Bloody Sunday footage in political video
item.description: Conservative Party leader Kemi Badenoch has issued an apology after a video opposing reforms to the Northern Ireland Legacy Act mistakenly included footage from Bloody Sunday, the 1972 incident in Lon...

item.title: A comparison of leading AI dictation apps and their key features in 2026
item.description: AI-powered dictation apps have improved significantly in recent years thanks to advances in large language models and speech recognition technology. These tools are now faster, more accurate, and capa...

item.title: Controlled Detonation of WWII Bomb in Plymouth Ensures Public Safety
item.description: A large World War Two bomb was safely detonated in Plymouth after being discovered at a building site in the Southway area. Authorities evacuated over 1,200 homes and established a 400-metre exclusion...

item.title: Colombia’s Peace Initiative Stalled Amid Resurgence of Rebel Violence
item.description: Colombia is witnessing a sharp escalation in armed conflict despite efforts to secure peace. Over the weekend, an improvised explosive device targeted vehicles on the southern Pan-American highway, ki...

item.title: Fashion Highlights from the 2026 Kentucky Derby
item.description: The 2026 Kentucky Derby at Churchill Downs in Louisville, Kentucky, was not only a showcase of equestrian excellence but also a vibrant display of fashion. Guests embraced the longstanding tradition o...

item.title: Senator Sandy Onor Secures PDP Presidential Nomination Forms for 2027 Election
item.description: Senator Prof Sandy Onor, a former Cross River State governorship candidate, has officially secured the presidential nomination forms of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) for the 2027 election. Onor, ...

item.title: Doctors Save US Marine After Air Crash and Fungal Infection
item.description: After surviving a deadly air crash in remote Northern Territory, US marine Travis Reyes faced an even greater threat: a rare, face-eating fungus and multiple organ failure. Doctors at The Alfred hospi...
